name: Bunker Hill Mining Corp.
business: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. is a development-stage mining company focused on restarting its 100% owned Bunker Hill Mine, a zinc-lead-silver mine in Idaho, USA. The company plans to produce zinc and lead-silver concentrates, which will be sold to Teck Resources under life-of-mine offtake agreements. As of December 31, 2025, the company had generated no revenue and expects to commence commercial production in 2026.

exposures.sentence: The Company intends to mine and mill polymetallic mineralization on-site to produce both zinc and lead-silver concentrates which is planned to be transported to Teck's Trail smelter for processing pursuant to an off-take agreement.

catalysts.event: Mine restart targeted for first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: Advanced processing plant construction and commissioning to 88% completion at year end 2025, with phased commissioning starting in January 2026: on track to support an expected mine restart in H1|26.

catalysts.event: Ranger Page property acquisition – first payment shares release
catalysts.sentence: 6 month anniversary from December 11, 2025 66,667 Payment Shares

catalysts.event: Ranger Page property acquisition – second payment shares release
Ranger Page property acquisition – final payment shares release
catalysts.sentence: 12 month anniversary of December 11, 2025 Balance of the Payment Shares (533,334 Payment Shares)
On March 5, 2026, we filed an amendment to our Certificate of Incorporation to implement the reverse stock split based on a one-for-thirty five (1-for-35) consolidation ratio on March 6, 2026.
